hero.description: I turn complex data into clear insights that help businesses make smarter decisions and achieve measurable growth.

about.title: ABOUT
about.subtitle: ABOUT ME
about.name: Hi, I'm Kelven Fontes
about.description: I am a Data Analyst with a background in Software Development and an MBA in Technology for Business focused on Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Big Data. I specialize in transforming complex datasets into actionable insights using Python, SQL and Power BI. My goal is to create analytical solutions and dashboards that help organizations make smarter, data-driven decisions.

Dashboard.title: DASHBOARD
Dashboard.subtitle: MY DASHBOARDS
Dashboard.description: Explore my interactive dashboards created with Power BI, which transform complex data into clear, actionable visual insights. Each dashboard is designed to help businesses make informed, strategic decisions based on real data.
Dashboard.descriptionShort1: Power BI dashboard with ride, revenue and rating analysis.

education.title1: MBA in Technology for Business: Data Science, AI and Big Data
education.description1: Postgraduate program focused on Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Big Data applied to business. Emphasis on machine learning, predictive modeling and data-driven decision making.
education.focus1: Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Big Data
education.title2: Bachelor's Degree in Multiplatform Software Development
education.description2: Solid background in software development and computing fundamentals.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: CONTACT ME
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities and connections. If you'd like to discuss a project, collaborate, or just say hello, feel free to reach out to me. I look forward to hearing from you!

footer.title: Data, analytics, and insights that create real impact!
